name.description:
FONT NAME:  NPS 1935
Copyright (c) 2008 by E. V. Norat II. All rights reserved.

This font is similar, but not exact, to an art deco type of text that was used on numerous posters/prints made for the National Park Service (NPS) and the Works Progress Administration (WPA) during the years of Depression era.  Circa 1935
